signalLabel: Property Risk Score — Overall (0–100)
idealNextStep: Route user to score-band-specific guidance: <60 → show top 3 critical risks with repair-vs-replace decision; 60-79 → show maintenance scheduling prompt; ≥80 → affirm and suggest proactive actions
missingIntermediateStep: Score-band routing logic in frontend; no differentiated CTA per band; icon-only action is invisible to new users
contextPrerequisites: at least one system/appliance age known
notes: Score 0-100, color coded: green 80+, amber 60-79, red <60. Shows dollar exposure. Backend produces per-asset risk levels with actionCta. Frontend shows generic arrow. Guidance Engine must prescribe next step per score band.

signalLabel: HVAC System — At or Past Expected Lifespan
idealNextStep: Run Repair vs Replace Analysis first to determine if replacement is warranted; check warranty coverage; then if replacement confirmed, surface provider search with cost estimate
missingIntermediateStep: Repair vs Replace decision step; coverage check (home warranty, insurance); cost budget validation before booking
notes: HVAC avgLife=15 years. ageRatio>1.0 = past life. Backend computes replacement cost ~$5500. Current CTA skips repair/replace analysis and goes direct to booking. Coverage check against home warranty is missing.

signalLabel: Roof System — Aging or Past Expected Lifespan
idealNextStep: Surface repair-vs-replace analysis; check insurance coverage for roof replacement; obtain inspection report before scheduling contractor
missingIntermediateStep: Insurance coverage check for roof replacement; inspection-first flow before booking
notes: Roof lifespan typically 20-30 years. Backend classifies as HIGH/CRITICAL when age ratio >0.85. Jumps to booking without diagnosis.

signalLabel: Water Heater — Near or At End of Life
idealNextStep: Check if unit is under recall, check home warranty coverage, then present repair-vs-replace analysis with estimated cost
missingIntermediateStep: Recall check integration; warranty coverage check before scheduling
contextPrerequisites: model number recorded for recall matching
notes: Water heater avgLife=10 years. Backend has cost data (~$1200). Recall match worker runs async but CTA does not surface recall status.

signalLabel: Maintenance Task Overdue
idealNextStep: Show severity and cost-of-delay estimate from do-nothing simulator; prompt user to confirm if DIY or hire professional; then route to provider search with task context pre-filled
missingIntermediateStep: DIY vs professional decision; cost-of-delay estimate surfaced; task context not passed to provider search
notes: Orchestration service sets ctaLabel to 'Overdue - Schedule Now'. Do-nothing simulator exists but is not surfaced inline with overdue tasks.

signalLabel: Seasonal Checklist Pending — Current Season
idealNextStep: For each checklist item that requires a service pro, surface inline 'Find Provider' button with category pre-filled; for DIY tasks, surface knowledge hub article link
missingIntermediateStep: Per-item routing: DIY vs service-needed; no provider context for service tasks; checklist expiration worker fires but no reminder escalation
notes: Worker: seasonalChecklistGeneration.job.ts generates checklists. seasonalChecklistExpiration.job.ts fires expiry. Items with professional=true should route to provider search.

signalLabel: Home Insurance Policy — Expiring Within 60 Days
idealNextStep: Show days-to-expiry prominently; link to risk premium optimizer to shop market rates; prompt user to upload new policy document after renewal
missingIntermediateStep: No expiry banner or notification in frontend; no link to rate-shopping tool; no document upload CTA post-renewal
notes: insuranceAuditor.service queries expiryDate >= now. Backend detects expiry but frontend has no prominent alert. CoverageLapseIncidents worker fires but frontend doesn't surface it as a CTA.

signalLabel: Coverage Gap Detected — NO_COVERAGE or WARRANTY_ONLY
idealNextStep: Show gap type (NO_COVERAGE, WARRANTY_ONLY, EXPIRED_INSURANCE) with dollar exposure; link to insurance auditor for remediation; show recommended coverage level
missingIntermediateStep: No CTA exists; user left stranded with gap information but no action path; no link to get quotes
notes: coverageGap.service.ts detects gapType: NO_COVERAGE, WARRANTY_ONLY, INSURANCE_ONLY, EXPIRED_WARRANTY, EXPIRED_INSURANCE. No frontend action mapped to any gap type.

signalLabel: Deductible-to-Cash-Buffer Ratio Exceeds Safe Threshold (>40%)
idealNextStep: Show deductible vs emergency fund comparison; link to budget forecaster to model raising cash buffer; surface option to review policy for lower deductible
missingIntermediateStep: No action for high deductible ratio; no link to budget or savings planner; no option to explore lower-deductible policy
notes: coverageAnalysis.service detects deductibleUsd/cashBufferUsd > 0.4 threshold and generates recommendation 'Review deductible vs emergency cash buffer'. No frontend CTA mapped.

signalLabel: Contractor Quote — Price Flagged Above Market Range
screen: Negotiation Shield Page, Service Price Radar Page
idealNextStep: Surface counter-offer script with specific line-item breakdown requests; show competing provider quotes; enable user to reject/negotiate quote inline
missingIntermediateStep: No counter-offer tool; no link to find alternative providers at market rate; no negotiation script export
notes: servicePriceRadar.engine has price ranges per category (ELECTRICAL baseLow:175 baseHigh:900). negotiationShield prompts to separate labor/materials/permits. No actionable negotiation flow in frontend.

signalLabel: Refinance Break-Even Not Yet Reached
screen: Break-Even Page, Mortgage Refinance Radar Page
idealNextStep: If current rates are below original rate by threshold, prompt user to get pre-qualification; surface lender comparison; show monthly savings estimate
missingIntermediateStep: No rate comparison to current market; no link to lender or pre-qualification flow; no savings projection vs. current mortgage
notes: breakEven.service computes breakEvenYearIndex and breakEvenCalendarYear. Workers ingest mortgage rates. No frontend CTA links to lender or pre-qualification.

signalLabel: Energy Audit — Inefficiency Detected (High Estimated Usage)
idealNextStep: Show top 3 energy waste sources with estimated annual savings; link to seasonal checklist for weatherization tasks; surface HVAC service booking if HVAC is flagged
missingIntermediateStep: No prioritized action list for reducing energy usage; no link to weatherization checklist; no integration with HVAC lifecycle signal
notes: energyAuditor.service exists. Frontend shows 'View Details' only. No action routing to weatherization or HVAC service.

signalLabel: Property Tax Assessment — Overpayment Risk Detected
idealNextStep: If overassessment detected, generate appeal letter template with evidence summary; show comparable sales used; provide deadline for filing
missingIntermediateStep: Appeal letter generation not surfaced as CTA; no deadline reminder; no comparable sales walkthrough
notes: taxAppeal.service.ts exists with full logic. Frontend shows general analysis page. No inline appeal initiation CTA.

signalLabel: Appliance Recall Match — OPEN Status
idealNextStep: Show prominent safety alert with recall severity; provide step-by-step manufacturer remedy instructions; link to confirm or dismiss recall match; track resolution status
missingIntermediateStep: No dedicated recall alert banner in dashboard; no direct link from recall to remedy flow; recall confirmation/dismissal exists in backend but not prominently in frontend
notes: recalls.service has confirmRecallMatch, dismissRecallMatch, resolveRecallMatch APIs. Worker recallMatch.job.ts matches inventory to ingested recalls. Frontend has no prominent safety alert UI.

signalLabel: Predictive Maintenance Alert — High Failure Probability
idealNextStep: Show predicted failure probability (%) and estimated cost of emergency repair vs proactive fix; provide scheduling CTA with pre-filled task details
missingIntermediateStep: Prediction data not surfaced on maintenance page with failure probability; no inline scheduling action from prediction view
contextPrerequisites: appliance age and service history recorded
notes: maintenancePrediction.service uses ageRatio to compute failureProb (0.15 early, 0.35 mid, 0.55+ late). Frontend maintenance page shows 'Not Scheduled' status but no prediction-driven CTA.

signalLabel: Property Inspection — No Recent Inspection on Record
idealNextStep: Show last inspection date and flag if >12 months old; explain what inspection covers and typical cost; then route to inspector search
missingIntermediateStep: No time-since-last-inspection display; no explanation of inspection scope; no differentiation between buyer inspection vs routine annual
notes: inspectionAnalysis.service stores InspectionReport with findings. Frontend routes to provider search but without time-since-last-inspection context or inspection scope education.

signalLabel: Inspection Defect Found — Action Item Unresolved
screen: Inspection Report Page, Negotiation Shield Page
idealNextStep: For each unresolved defect, classify severity (critical/major/minor); surface estimated repair cost; link to book specialist for that defect category; track resolution
missingIntermediateStep: No per-defect repair cost estimate; no severity-to-provider-category mapping; no resolution tracking per defect item
notes: InspectionReport model exists in Prisma. negotiationShieldBuyerInspection.service.ts handles buyer leverage analysis. No per-defect CTA routing to repair booking.

signalLabel: Unpermitted Work Suspected — Missing Permit Record
screen: Home Score Report Page, Documents Page
idealNextStep: Show which modifications likely require permits; link to county permit records search; provide guidance on retroactive permit filing; surface risk-to-home-value if unpermitted work is discovered
missingIntermediateStep: No permit record check; no retroactive permit guidance; homeModificationAdvisor has permitRequired flag but no frontend action for it
notes: homeModificationAdvisor.service has permitRequired:true for certain work types. homeScoreReport tracks COUNTY_PERMITS as PARTIAL. No frontend action exists for permit compliance gap.

signalLabel: Neighborhood Change Detected — Nearby Property Permit or Sale
feature: Home Event Radar / Neighborhood Change Radar
idealNextStep: Classify event impact (positive/negative/neutral on home value); for major nearby construction or sale, prompt user to update home valuation; surface sell/hold/rent analysis if market is hot
missingIntermediateStep: Event impact classification not shown; no link to update home valuation; no connection to sell/hold/rent tool
notes: homeEventRadar fires HOME_EVENT_RADAR_ action codes. Worker refreshNeighborhoodEvents.job.ts runs. Frontend shows event list but no value-impact analysis or next-step routing.

signalLabel: Seller Prep Plan — Pre-Listing Item Incomplete
screen: Seller Prep Page (not in standard dashboard nav — tools section)
idealNextStep: Surface ROI-ranked pre-listing to-do list; for each item, show estimated value add and estimated cost; link to book relevant service provider
missingIntermediateStep: No dedicated frontend page surfaced in dashboard navigation; sellerPrep plan exists in backend but no frontend screens discovered
contextPrerequisites: user has indicated intent to sell
notes: sellerPrep.service.ts, roiRules.engine.ts, valueCalculator.engine.ts exist. SellerPrepPlan and SellerPrepLead models exist in Prisma. No frontend screens found in dashboard routing.

signalLabel: Do-Nothing Scenario — Projected Cost of Inaction
idealNextStep: For each deferred item, show cumulative cost-of-delay at 6, 12, 24 months; surface 'Act Now' button per item that routes to relevant maintenance booking or repair tool
missingIntermediateStep: No per-item 'Act Now' CTA linking from simulation to action; simulation is standalone page not inline with overdue tasks
notes: doNothingSimulator models cost growth over time. UI is isolated; not integrated into maintenance overdue signal flow.

signalLabel: Booking Confirmed — Awaiting Provider Confirmation
screen: Bookings List Page, Booking Detail Page
idealNextStep: Show booking status timeline; if provider hasn't confirmed within 24h, prompt user to follow up or find alternative provider; surface provider rating/background check status
missingIntermediateStep: No follow-up prompt if confirmation delayed; no escalation path to alternative provider; no provider vetting info surfaced
notes: BookingStatus enum: DRAFT, PENDING, CONFIRMED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, DISPUTED. Frontend shows 'View Details' only with no status-specific actions.

signalLabel: Booking Completed — Payment Pending, No Review Submitted
idealNextStep: Prompt user to confirm work completion, rate provider, upload completion photo, and update maintenance task status to DONE
missingIntermediateStep: No post-work completion confirmation flow; no photo upload CTA; no maintenance task auto-close on booking completion; no review prompt
notes: orchestrationCompletionPhoto.service.ts exists for photo completion. No frontend CTA connects booking completion to maintenance task resolution, review submission, or document upload.

signalLabel: Insurance Claim — Denied or Underpaid
idealNextStep: Surface appeal checklist for denied claim; show settlement comparison vs similar claims; provide negotiation script for underpaid claim; link to public adjuster search
missingIntermediateStep: No appeal guidance for denied claims; no settlement benchmarking surfaced; no link to find public adjuster
notes: claims.transitions.ts: DENIED can transition to CLOSED only. negotiationShieldInsuranceClaimSettlement.service.ts exists. No appeal workflow in frontend.

signalLabel: Home Savings Goal — Monthly Contribution Behind Target
idealNextStep: Show contribution gap vs target; show what specific upcoming costs are unfunded; provide 'Set Auto-Contribution' CTA or budget reallocation suggestion
missingIntermediateStep: No specific upcoming cost tied to savings gap; no auto-contribution setup CTA; no integration with budget forecaster
notes: homeSavings.service and budgetForecaster.service exist. Frontend shows savings plan page but no integration to specific unfunded costs.

signalLabel: Climate Risk Score — High Flood or Wildfire Exposure
idealNextStep: Show specific flood/wildfire/freeze risk scores; for flood: link to check/update flood insurance; for wildfire: surface defensible-space checklist; for freeze: surface winterization checklist
missingIntermediateStep: No risk-type-specific action routing; no link to get flood insurance quote; no defensible-space checklist; freeze risk worker fires incident but no frontend action
notes: freezeRiskIncidents.job.ts and climateRiskPredictor.service.ts exist. frontend shows risk page but 'View Climate Risk' does not route to specific mitigation actions.

signalLabel: Home Habit Coach — Habit Overdue or Repeatedly Snoozed
idealNextStep: For repeatedly snoozed habits (snoozeCount > 3), surface consequence of not doing the task; offer to convert habit to scheduled maintenance task with provider booking option
missingIntermediateStep: No consequence display for snooze fatigue; no conversion path from habit to formal maintenance task with provider
notes: habitRankingEngine prioritizes overdue/snoozed habits. snoozeCount tracked. No escalation path in frontend when habit is chronically deferred.

signalLabel: Home Digital Twin — Data Quality Below Threshold
idealNextStep: Show data completeness % with specific gaps (e.g., 'Missing: Water heater age, Roof installation date'); deep-link each gap to the relevant data entry form
missingIntermediateStep: Generic 'Add Missing Data' — no per-field deep links; no prioritization of which gaps most impact risk or financial accuracy
notes: homeDigitalTwinQuality.service tracks completeness. homeDigitalTwinBuilder rebuilds twin incrementally. Frontend CTA is generic 'Add Missing Data' with no field-level routing.

signalLabel: Home Gazette — AI-Generated Weekly Digest Available
idealNextStep: For each gazette recommendation section (MAINTENANCE, FINANCIAL, RISK, SEASONAL), surface a per-section action CTA that routes to the relevant tool with context pre-filled
missingIntermediateStep: Gazette shows articles with 'View Details' only; no per-recommendation actionable CTA; no link from gazette insight to specific tool
contextPrerequisites: property has data for signal generation
notes: gazetteGeneration.job.ts runs weekly. gazette.types.ts sourceFeature includes MAINTENANCE, INCIDENT, REFINANCE_RADAR. Frontend HomeGazetteClient shows 'View Details' per article without action routing.

signalLabel: Hidden Asset Found — Unclaimed Program or Rebate Eligible
idealNextStep: Show specific programs user qualifies for with estimated dollar value; provide step-by-step application instructions or direct link to application portal; track claim status
missingIntermediateStep: No application link or direct-to-portal CTA; no claim status tracking after user views program; no estimated deadline for time-limited programs
notes: hiddenAssets.service and hiddenAssetRefresh.job.ts exist. HiddenAssetProgram model in Prisma. Frontend shows 'View Program Details' but no application flow or status tracking.

signalLabel: Sell / Hold / Rent Analysis — Optimal Exit Window Detected
idealNextStep: If SELL is optimal: link to seller prep plan and agent referral; if RENT: link to rental income calculator and landlord checklist; if HOLD: show appreciation trajectory and break-even
missingIntermediateStep: No outcome-specific action routing; analysis result doesn't link to next step (seller prep, rental setup, or hold strategy)
notes: sellHoldRent.service uses appreciationRate, homeValueNow, rental income. No frontend routing from analysis result to sell prep, rental onboarding, or hold strategy.

signalLabel: Inventory Missing — No Appliance/System Documented
idealNextStep: Show which appliance/system categories are empty and explain downstream impact (recall matching will be blocked, risk assessment incomplete, coverage gap analysis limited); offer OCR upload shortcut
missingIntermediateStep: No completeness score for inventory; no explanation of downstream impact of missing items; OCR import exists but not prominently surfaced
notes: inventoryOcr.service exists for receipt scanning. inventoryVerification.service for cross-validation. Frontend 'Add Item' exists but no guidance on which items are most critical to add first.

signalLabel: Home Capital Timeline — Major Expense Horizon Within 12 Months
idealNextStep: For expenses within 12 months, show current savings vs required amount; link to savings planner with pre-filled target; surface insurance coverage check for covered items
missingIntermediateStep: No savings-gap calculation tied to upcoming capital expense; no link to savings planner; no insurance coverage cross-check
notes: homeCapitalTimeline.service projects replacement costs based on appliance ages. No savings integration or coverage check routing from timeline view.

signalLabel: Contractor Urgency Flag — Artificial Urgency Detected in Quote
idealNextStep: Show specific urgency manipulation red flags found; provide counter-script to use with contractor; recommend getting 2 competing quotes before deciding
missingIntermediateStep: Red flags displayed but no counter-script provided; no link to find alternative providers; no structured 'get 3 quotes' workflow
notes: negotiationShieldContractorUrgency.service.ts exists. Urgency flags detected from quote analysis. No counter-negotiation script or competing quote workflow in frontend.

signalLabel: Insurance Premium — Above Market for Property Profile
screen: Risk Premium Optimizer Page, Insurance Page
idealNextStep: Show premium vs market benchmark with estimated annual savings; provide ranked list of risk-reduction actions that would lower premium; link to insurer comparison
missingIntermediateStep: No insurer comparison link; savings amount shown but no ranked action list for risk reduction; no 'Get Quote' CTA to act on savings opportunity
notes: riskPremiumOptimizer.service.ts exists. insuranceCostTrend.service.ts tracks premium trend. Frontend shows optimizer page but no ranked action list or insurer comparison link.

signalLabel: Home Risk Replay — Historical Incident Pattern Identified
idealNextStep: Identify recurring risk patterns (e.g., annual HVAC breakdowns); show pattern-to-prevention recommendation; link to preventive maintenance scheduling
missingIntermediateStep: Historical pattern analysis shown but no pattern-to-action routing; no link from identified pattern to preventive task scheduling
notes: homeRiskReplay.engine.ts analyzes historical events. ingestHomeRiskEvents.job.ts ingests data. No frontend routing from pattern to preventive action.

signalLabel: Visual Inspection — AI Defect Detected from Photo
idealNextStep: For each AI-detected defect, classify severity; link to book relevant specialist; offer to add defect as maintenance task; estimate repair cost range
missingIntermediateStep: No per-defect action routing; no booking CTA from finding; no maintenance task creation from finding; no cost estimate
notes: visualInspector.service uses Gemini for photo analysis. roomInsights.service provides room-level scoring. No per-finding action flow in frontend.

signalLabel: Appreciation Index — Local Appreciation Below National Average
idealNextStep: Show appreciation vs benchmark; if below average, surface home improvement ROI analysis to identify value-boosting projects; link to sell/hold/rent tool for hold-vs-sell decision
missingIntermediateStep: No link from appreciation data to home improvement ROI analysis; no sell/hold/rent prompt when appreciation is weak; informational only
notes: appreciationIndex.service, valueIntelligence.service, propertyAppreciation.service exist. No frontend routing to improvement ROI or sell/hold decision from low appreciation signal.

signalLabel: True Cost of Ownership — Monthly Cost Exceeds Market Comparable
idealNextStep: Identify highest-cost line items above market; for each, surface tool or action to reduce (e.g., energy audit for utilities, insurance optimizer for premium, tax appeal for property tax)
missingIntermediateStep: No line-item action routing; analysis is informational; no link from high cost-line to relevant reduction tool
notes: trueCostOwnership.service.ts exists. Frontend shows full analysis but no line-item action routing to cost-reduction tools.

signalLabel: Insurance Document — Policy Not Uploaded / OCR Not Processed
idealNextStep: After upload, auto-extract coverage limits, deductible, expiry date; confirm extracted data with user; immediately run coverage gap analysis with extracted values
missingIntermediateStep: No confirmation step after OCR extraction; no automatic coverage gap trigger after successful upload; manual verification step not guided
notes: insuranceOcr.service extracts policy data. documentIntelligence.service processes documents. No post-upload confirmation or automatic coverage gap trigger in frontend.

signalLabel: Risk Assessment — Incomplete Property Details Block Full Assessment
screen: Risk Assessment Page, Property Profile Page
currentActionLabel: CRITICAL: Complete property details to run full assessment
idealNextStep: Show a step-by-step onboarding checklist showing exactly which fields are missing; deep-link each field; show what each field unlocks (risk calculation, recall matching, etc.)
missingIntermediateStep: Generic navigation to property page; no field-level deep links; no explanation of what each missing field unlocks
notes: RiskAssessment.service returns actionCta: 'CRITICAL: Complete property details to run full assessment' when property details are incomplete. Frontend navigation is generic.

signalLabel: Booking Disputed — Unresolved Dispute
idealNextStep: Surface dispute resolution checklist; link to file formal insurance claim if applicable; provide mediation request form; escalate to platform support
missingIntermediateStep: No dispute resolution flow; no link to claims or platform support from DISPUTED booking status
notes: BookingStatus.DISPUTED exists in enum. No dispute resolution workflow in backend services or frontend UI.

signalLabel: Home Renovation — High Risk Modification Planned
idealNextStep: Show permit requirements, estimated cost range, ROI impact, and insurance implications; link to permit filing guidance; suggest licensed contractor search for permitted work
missingIntermediateStep: permitRequired flag not surfaced as action item; no link to permit filing; no ROI tied to specific project type
notes: homeModificationAdvisor.service has permitRequired flag for work types. No permit filing link or licensed contractor requirement surfaced in frontend.

signalLabel: Daily Home Pulse — Action-Required Micro-Task Today
idealNextStep: For tasks requiring professional service, inline 'Book Provider' CTA instead of 'Mark Complete'; differentiate DIY tasks vs professional tasks
missingIntermediateStep: All tasks show 'Mark Complete' regardless of whether they require a professional; no DIY vs. professional routing
notes: dailyHomePulse.service.ts uses ctaLabel: 'Mark complete' for all task types. No differentiation between DIY and professional tasks in CTA routing.

signalLabel: Electrical Panel — Age Risk or Recall Flag
idealNextStep: Show electrical panel age, brand risk (certain brands like Federal Pacific are known failure risks); link to recall check; require licensed electrician inspection before any work
missingIntermediateStep: No brand-specific risk warning (Federal Pacific, Zinsco); no recall cross-check for panel; routing directly to booking without safety education
contextPrerequisites: electrical panel age and brand known
notes: servicePriceRadar notes electrical work carries permit and safety-driven premiums. No brand-specific risk warnings or recall cross-reference in electrical panel signal flow.

signalLabel: Cost Volatility Alert — Service Category Price Spike Detected
idealNextStep: For categories with price spikes, suggest locking in service quotes now before further increase; link to find providers in that category with price range context
missingIntermediateStep: No CTA to book while prices are lower; no integration with service price radar to compare current quotes vs benchmark
contextPrerequisites: historical price data for service categories
notes: costVolatility.service.ts and costVolatility.controller.ts exist. No proactive booking CTA for price-volatile categories.

signalLabel: Plumbing System — Age Risk Signal (15+ Year Pipes)
idealNextStep: Show pipe material type risk (galvanized vs copper vs PEX); estimate cost of repiping vs inspection; check if water damage history exists; surface insurance implication
missingIntermediateStep: No pipe material type education; no water damage history cross-check; no insurance implication for aging pipes
contextPrerequisites: pipe material and age known or estimated from build year
notes: RiskAssessment.service generates PLUMBING risk category. Routing to provider without pipe material education or insurance check is premature.

signalLabel: Home Gazette — Seasonal Preparedness Section Published
idealNextStep: Link gazette seasonal section directly to the seasonal checklist; pre-check items already completed; show percentage of seasonal readiness
missingIntermediateStep: Gazette seasonal section is disconnected from seasonal checklist; no pre-checked items from existing completions; no readiness percentage
notes: Duplicate signal family with SIG-029. This specifically targets the SEASONAL section of gazette vs general AI digest. Action routing gap is same.

signalLabel: Moving Concierge — Move-In Task Checklist Incomplete
idealNextStep: For each incomplete move-in task, show priority (safety-critical vs convenience); link HVAC filter change, lock rekey, and utility setup to specific providers or guides
missingIntermediateStep: No priority ranking for move-in tasks; no provider search link for safety-critical tasks like lock rekey or HVAC service
notes: movingConcierge.service.ts exists. Checklist tasks vary by urgency but no priority ranking or service-provider linking in frontend.

signalLabel: Home Score — Overall Score Below 70 (Multi-Domain Risk)
idealNextStep: Show lowest-scoring domain (HEALTH, RISK, FINANCIAL) with the 2-3 most impactful actions to improve score; route user to each action with context pre-filled
missingIntermediateStep: No domain-level drill-down to specific improvement actions; score shown but no score-improvement roadmap surfaced
notes: homeScoreReport computes homeScore = average(healthScore, riskScore, financialScore) * 10. Three component domains. No domain-level improvement roadmap surfaced in frontend.

signalLabel: Home Buyer Task — Pre-Closing Action Item Incomplete
idealNextStep: Show task deadline, consequence of missing it (e.g., losing earnest money, missed inspection window); link task to required professional or document
missingIntermediateStep: No deadline urgency display; no consequence warning; no professional or document link per task
notes: HomeBuyerTask.service.ts manages pre-closing task list. Frontend actions page exists. No deadline urgency or consequence display.

signalLabel: Recall Match — DISMISSED Without Resolution
idealNextStep: After dismissal, show reason for dismissal; if user dismisses 'does not apply', offer to permanently exclude from recall matching; if user dismissed without resolving, send 30-day reminder
missingIntermediateStep: No dismissal reason capture; no follow-up reminder for unresolved dismissals; no permanent exclusion option
notes: recalls.service has dismissRecallMatch API (sets status=DISMISSED). No frontend reason capture or follow-up reminder workflow.

signalLabel: Coverage Lapse Incident — Worker-Detected Insurance Gap
idealNextStep: Show lapse duration and estimated exposure during gap; link to upload new policy document; provide insurer search for immediate coverage
missingIntermediateStep: Worker fires incident but no frontend alert banner; no link to policy upload or insurer search
contextPrerequisites: coverage lapse incident created by worker
notes: coverageLapseIncidents.job.ts runs scheduled. Creates incident record. No frontend alert or action linked to coverage lapse incident type.

signalLabel: Budget Forecaster — Projected Monthly Shortfall
idealNextStep: Show which upcoming expenses are driving the shortfall; surface cost-reduction tools (energy audit, premium optimizer, tax appeal) for the largest expense categories
missingIntermediateStep: No per-category cost-reduction tool routing; no link from budget shortfall to specific savings actions
notes: budgetForecaster.service.ts exists. Frontend budget page shows forecast. No routing from shortfall signal to specific cost-reduction tools.

signalLabel: Property Onboarding Incomplete — Risk / Financial Features Locked
idealNextStep: Show onboarding progress bar (e.g., 40% complete); list specific missing fields grouped by impact; provide quick-add forms inline rather than routing away
missingIntermediateStep: No onboarding progress indicator; property page routes to provider for inspection before basic data is captured; missing fields not enumerated
notes: properties/[id]/page.tsx uses buttonLabel 'Schedule Inspection' or 'Schedule Comprehensive Assessment' for incomplete profiles. Routes to providers before basic property data is entered.
